'''Omal''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was a student of [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] history under the tutelage of [[Murk Lundi]], who lived on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] circa [[38 BBY/Legends|38 BBY]].

==Biography==
One of the best of Lundi's pupils, the youth trailed his classmate [[Norval]] to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kodai]]. Upon arrival, they found their teacher attempting to recover a long-lost [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]]; Norval, however, wanted to obtain the artifact for himself. Through Omal's actions, the [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] was prevented from falling into the wrong hands, having been cast deep into the bowels of a geyser.

Some time later, Omal and another of Lundi's students, [[Dedra]], lived together on an unknown world.

{{Char-stub}}
